rationale: Educ. Code §13.008 governs school district boundary changes requiring board of trustees approval. It has no relation to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Any change in the boundaries of a school district is not effective unless approved by a majority of the board of trustees of the district if the board's approval is required under this chapter.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns boundary changes, not homestead exemptions.
